title: Spicy Artichoke Tacos
description: A twist on traditional tacos, this recipe combines the flavors of Mexico with the crunch of artichoke hearts.

ingredients.name: Artichoke Hearts
ingredients.notes: Canned artichoke hearts work well in this recipe.

ingredients.name: Ground Beef
ingredients.notes: Use 80/20 ground beef for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Use a sweet onion, like Vidalia, for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Use fresh garlic for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Cumin
ingredients.notes: Ground cumin is a staple spice in Mexican cooking.

ingredients.name: Chili Powder
ingredients.notes: Use a mild or medium-hot chili powder, depending on your preference.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use kosher salt for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Black Pepper
ingredients.notes: Use freshly ground black pepper for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Lime Juice
ingredients.notes: Use fresh lime juice for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Cilantro
ingredients.notes: Use fresh cilantro for the best flavor.

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the cumin, chili powder, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the chopped artichoke hearts and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 5-7 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
Warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the beef and artichoke mixture onto a tortilla and topping with chopped cilantro and a squeeze of lime juice.
